features: VERSATILE WET & DRY USE: These disposable dry wipes for adults are perfect for both wet and dry applications. Use them dry to wipe your face, for baby body cleaning, or simply add water to turn them into soft, absorbent wet wipes for sensitive skin, makeup removal, and tableware cleaning.

THICK & SUPER ABSORBENT: Crafted with an extra-thick design, these eco-friendly wipes are much thicker than regular paper towels, offering superior water absorption. They leave no residue behind, making them ideal for face cleaning, makeup removal, cleaning after daily makeup, or personal care needs.

MULTIPURPOSE & PORTABLE: This multipack of face wipes is ideal for various uses such as removing makeup, washing your face, caring for sensitive skin, cleaning shoes, and baby body cleaning. Perfect as travel makeup wipes, ensuring convenient hygiene anywhere.

CONVENIENT LARGE SIZE & EASY DISPENSING: Each travel makeup wipe is generously sized at 20 x 20 cm (7.72in x 7.72in), providing full coverage for personal care and tableware cleaning. The pull-out design ensures easy access and makes it simple to grab a wipe when you need it, whether at home or on the go.

ECO-FRIENDLY & SAFE FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: Made from plant-based biodegradable cotton, these chemical-free, fragrance-free dry wipes are perfect for sensitive skin. They are an eco-friendly choice for daily personal care, offering peace of mind with every use.
